holdings.infoBox: BBEM is an equity ETF with a total of 1489 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.40%, Samsung Electronics at 6.63%, SK hynix at 6.12%, Tencent Holdings at 2.65%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.72%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders Emerging Markets Equity ETF (BBEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-capitalization companies in emerging markets. BBEM was launched on May 10, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
